summary.verdict_desc: 市场广度由 71% 回落至 51%，breadth 由绿转黄；估值（CAPE 42.05、Top-5 28.5%）与资金面（VC AI 占比 81%、Mag4 FCF -91%、NVDA 客户投资/收入 67%）持续亮红，整体红灯比例 21.7% 虽未到 40%，但估值类 2/3 红 + 资金面 3/4 红触发分类强制升级（历史上估值+资金面双类共振是泡沫顶部最一致的领先信号）
summary.verdict_desc_en: Market breadth pulled back from 71% to 51% (green→yellow). Valuation (CAPE 42.05, Top-5 28.5%) and capital (VC AI share 81%, Mag4 FCF -91%, NVDA customer-investment-to-revenue 67%) remain RED. Total red ratio 21.7% is below 40%, but valuation 2/3 RED + capital 3/4 RED triggers the category-override rule — historically the most consistent leading combination at bubble tops.

wow_changes.note: S&P 50 日均线上方比例 71% → 51%，市场广度走弱，由绿转黄
wow_changes.note_en: % S&P 500 above 50-day MA fell from 71% to 51% — breadth weakened from green to yellow

indicators.note: 155 年来第 2 高，距 2000 年峰值 44.19 仅 5%；隐含未来年化回报 ~1.3%，较 20 年均值 27.5 高出 48.6%
indicators.note_en: 2nd highest in 155 years, just 5% below the 2000 peak of 44.19; implied annualized return ~1.3%, 48.6% above the 20-year average of 27.5

indicators.note: NVDA ~7.0 + AAPL ~6.3 + MSFT ~4.6 + GOOGL ~5.5 + AMZN ~5.1；Top10 ~36%；仍超 2000 峰值 ~18%
indicators.note_en: NVDA ~7.0 + AAPL ~6.3 + MSFT ~4.6 + GOOGL ~5.5 + AMZN ~5.1; Top 10 ~36%; still above the 2000 peak of ~18%

indicators.note: 较半导体行业中位数 ~36 折价 ~30%，估值反而是 Mag7 中最低；分析师区间 24.5-25.1
indicators.note_en: About 30% discount to semiconductor industry median (~36); lowest forward P/E among Mag7; analyst range 24.5-25.1

indicators.threshold_text: 指引下调=红 / 加速=黄 / 稳健=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Guidance cut = red / accelerating = yellow / steady = green
indicators.note: Mag4 2026 合计 ~$725B (vs 2025 $410B, +77%)：MSFT $190B、AMZN $200B、GOOGL $180-190B、META $125-145B；仍在加速且指引被上调，但市场已开始系统性惩罚
indicators.note_en: Mag4 2026 total ~$725B (vs $410B in 2025, +77%): MSFT $190B / AMZN $200B / GOOGL $180-190B / META $125-145B; still accelerating with raised guidance, but the market has begun systematic punishment

indicators.note: Amazon Q1 FCF 同比 -95%，仅 $1.2B（capex 单季 $44.2B 几乎吃掉所有 OCF）；Meta、MSFT 同步承压；Q3 季度 FCF 估降至 ~$4B vs 疫情后季度均值 $45B
indicators.note_en: Amazon Q1 FCF -95% YoY at just $1.2B (single-quarter capex of $44.2B nearly consumed all OCF); Meta and MSFT under similar pressure; Q3 quarterly FCF estimated at ~$4B vs post-pandemic quarterly average of $45B

indicators.name_zh: AI 占 VC 投资比重
indicators.note: Q1 2026 全球 VC $297B 创纪录，AI $242B/81%；OpenAI $122B + Anthropic $30B + xAI $20B + Waymo $16B = 65% 全部 VC；美国占全球 83%
indicators.note_en: Q1 2026 global VC $297B (all-time high), of which AI $242B/81%; OpenAI $122B + Anthropic $30B + xAI $20B + Waymo $16B = 65% of all VC; US accounts for 83% globally

indicators.note: NVDA 2026 年度股权投资突破 $40B（OpenAI $30B + Anthropic + xAI 等），叠加客户承诺 ~$110B；Huang 称 OpenAI 已是 "最后一笔"，circular financing 担忧加剧（OpenAI 拿钱后回购 NVDA GPU）
indicators.note_en: NVDA 2026 equity investments crossed $40B (OpenAI $30B + Anthropic + xAI etc.), plus customer commitments ~$110B; Huang said OpenAI is 'the last one,' but circular-financing concerns intensify (OpenAI uses funds to buy back NVDA GPUs)

indicators.note: 由上周 71% 回落至 51.19%（区间 50.09-52.48），由绿转黄；超过 50 仍偏多但动量明显减弱
indicators.note_en: Pulled back from 71% last week to 51.19% (range 50.09-52.48), green→yellow; above 50% is still bullish but momentum has clearly weakened

indicators.name_zh: 市值加权 vs 等权重
indicators.note: RSP YTD 2026 +4.24% vs SPY +0.89%，等权重持续跑赢 ~3.4pp，头部独涨阶段未重启
indicators.note_en: RSP YTD 2026 +4.24% vs SPY +0.89%; equal-weight continues to outperform by ~3.4pp — top-heavy regime not restarted

indicators.name_zh: AI 龙头内部人卖买比
indicators.note: Huang 累计 10b5-1 抛售 $2.9B（新增 6M 股 ~$865M 计划）、过去 18 月 15 名 NVDA 内部人零买入；近 30 天 Mag7 综合卖买比 ~8x，距 2000 极值 23x 仍远
indicators.note_en: Huang's cumulative 10b5-1 sales reach $2.9B (new 6M-share ~$865M plan); 15 NVDA insiders bought zero shares over the past 18 months; trailing-30-day Mag7 aggregate sell/buy ratio ~8x, still far from the 2000 peak of 23x

indicators.threshold_text: 洪流=红 / 升温=黄 / 平静=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Flood = red / Warming = yellow / Quiet = green
indicators.note: SpaceX 6 月路演（21 投行、$75B+ 募资目标）、OpenAI Q4 IPO @$500B、Anthropic 10 月 IPO @$380-900B、Cerebras S-1 已提交（$26.6B 估值）；管道继续升温，距洪流仅一步
indicators.note_en: SpaceX June roadshow (21 underwriters, $75B+ target), OpenAI Q4 IPO @$500B, Anthropic October IPO @$380-900B, Cerebras S-1 already filed ($26.6B valuation); pipeline keeps warming — one step from flood

indicators.note: ICE BofA HY OAS 维持 2.79%，仍在历史区间偏低端；信用市场未对 AI capex 与广度走弱做出紧缩反应
indicators.note_en: ICE BofA HY OAS holds at 2.79%, still on the lower end of the historical range; credit markets have not tightened in response to AI capex or breadth weakness

indicators.name_zh: 数据中心 ABS 利差
indicators.threshold_text: 走阔 50bps+ = 红 / 稳定 = 黄 / 收窄 = 绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widening 50bps+ = red / Stable = yellow / Tightening = green
indicators.note: CoreWeave 4 月 $2.75B 5Y HY 定价 9.75% 创高；Nebius 新增 $4.3B 可转债 + NVDA $2B；ABS 本身利差未走阔，但 HY 定价已传递成本压力
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave April $2.75B 5Y HY priced at 9.75%, a high; Nebius added $4.3B convertibles + NVDA $2B; ABS spreads themselves haven't widened, but HY pricing already reflects cost pressure

indicators.note: CoreWeave (B1/B/BB-) / Nebius / Nscale / Crusoe / Lambda 90 日内无评级下调或违约；CoreWeave D/E ~4.5x、Nebius 1.1x，CoreWeave 利息支出同比 3x 是潜在风险点
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave (B1/B/BB-) / Nebius / Nscale / Crusoe / Lambda — no rating downgrades or defaults in 90 days; CoreWeave D/E ~4.5x, Nebius 1.1x; CoreWeave's interest expense up 3x YoY is a latent risk

indicators.name_zh: AI 行业 Token 月度环比
indicators.threshold_text: 收缩=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Contraction = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: OpenRouter 周度 >20T tokens（YoY 4x，从 5T→20T）；中国模型周度 4.12T 首超美国 2.94T；agent workload 推动单请求 100K-1M tokens
indicators.note_en: OpenRouter weekly volume >20T tokens (4x YoY, from 5T to 20T); Chinese models 4.12T weekly, surpassing US 2.94T for the first time; agent workloads push 100K-1M tokens per request

indicators.name_zh: Token 增速 / 收入增速 比值
indicators.note: Anthropic ARR 80x YoY ($1B→$30B) vs token ~10x；Claude Code $500M→$2.5B（5 个月）；收入仍跑赢 token = 单 token 价值仍在上升
indicators.note_en: Anthropic ARR 80x YoY ($1B → $30B) vs token ~10x; Claude Code $500M → $2.5B in 5 months; revenue still outpaces token volume — per-token value still rising

indicators.name_zh: AI 收入增速的二阶导
indicators.threshold_text: 减速=红 / 平稳=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Decel = red / Flat = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Anthropic: $14B (2 月) → $19B (3 月) → $30B (4 月)，单月增量从 $5B→$11B；OpenAI $24B（$2B/月）；二阶导持续为正
indicators.note_en: Anthropic: $14B (Feb) → $19B (Mar) → $30B (Apr); monthly increment from $5B to $11B; OpenAI $24B ($2B/month); 2nd derivative remains positive

indicators.note: Deloitte 2026 调查 72% 企业至少 1 项 AI workload 上线生产；80%+ Fortune 500 跑 AI agent；但仅 25% 完成 ≥40% pilot 转产，54% 预计未来 3-6 月达成
indicators.note_en: Deloitte 2026 survey: 72% of enterprises have at least one AI workload in production; 80%+ of Fortune 500 run AI agents; but only 25% have moved ≥40% of pilots to production, with 54% expecting to in the next 3-6 months

indicators.threshold_text: 负增长=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Negative = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: MSFT cRPO $627B (+99% YoY，剔除 OpenAI 仍 +26%)；Google Cloud backlog $462B (+93%) 翻倍；GCP Q1 收入 +63% 但产能受限；hyperscaler 总积压 ~$2T
indicators.note_en: MSFT cRPO $627B (+99% YoY, +26% ex-OpenAI); Google Cloud backlog $462B (+93%, doubled); GCP Q1 revenue +63% but capacity-constrained; hyperscaler total backlog ~$2T

indicators.threshold_text: 任何=红 / 调查=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any confirmed = red / Investigation = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: Burry 估算 Mag7 2026-28 折旧政策可能虚增收益 24%（累计 $226B：ORCL +62%/AMZN +31%/META +30%/MSFT +16%），但尚无 SEC 执法或审计师质疑
indicators.note_en: Burry estimates Mag7 2026-28 depreciation policy may overstate earnings by 24% (cumulative $226B: ORCL +62% / AMZN +31% / META +30% / MSFT +16%), but no SEC enforcement or auditor concerns yet

indicators.threshold_text: 加息=红 / 通胀压力=黄 / 降息=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Hike = red / Inflation pressure = yellow / Cut = green
indicators.note: 4/29 FOMC 维持 3.5-3.75%（连续第 3 次按兵不动）；8-4 投票 32 年来首次 4 名异议；通胀措辞由 "略高" 改为 "高位"；Powell 5/15 卸任主席，Warsh 接任
indicators.note_en: 4/29 FOMC held 3.5-3.75% (3rd consecutive hold); 8-4 vote — first 4-dissenter decision in 32 years; inflation language changed from 'somewhat elevated' to 'elevated'; Powell steps down 5/15, Warsh succeeds as Chair

indicators.name_zh: 资本开支指引市场反应
indicators.threshold_text: 系统性惩罚=红 / 偶发=黄 / 奖励=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Systematic punishment = red / Episodic = yellow / Rewarded = green
indicators.note: Q1 财报后 META -7% 至 -10%（capex 上调至 $145B，市值蒸发 $175B、JPM 下调评级）；MSFT -2.5%；惩罚扩散至 2 家 Mag4，离系统性一步之遥
indicators.note_en: After Q1 earnings: META -7% to -10% (capex raised to $145B, $175B market cap erased, JPM downgraded); MSFT -2.5%; punishment now spread across 2 Mag4 names, one step from systemic

indicators.threshold_text: 普遍承认过热=红 / 部分=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widespread acknowledgment = red / Partial = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: Pichai："无公司能免疫泡沫破裂、有非理性元素"；Altman："投资者过度兴奋、有人会损失巨额"；Dimon："钱会被浪费、比别人更担心"；表态趋同但未达普遍认领
indicators.note_en: Pichai: 'no company immune to bubble bursts, irrational elements present'; Altman: 'investors overly excited, some will lose enormously'; Dimon: 'money will be wasted, more worried than others'; language converging but not yet universally acknowledged
